<div id="content-side-layout"
class="hidden xl:flex self-start sticky xl:flex-col max-w-[28rem] z-[21] h-[calc(100vh-9.5rem)] top-[calc(9.5rem-var(--sidenav-move-up,0px))]">

class="z-10 hidden xl:flex box-border max-h-full pl-10 w-[19rem]">

class="text-gray-600 text-sm leading-6 w-[16.5rem] overflow-y-auto space-y-2 pb-4 -mt-10 pt-10">

src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="h-3 w-3" />On this page

<div>

- <a href="build-client.html#next-steps"
  class="break-words py-1 block hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300">Next

<div id="content-area"
class="relative grow box-border flex-col w-full mx-auto px-1 lg:pl-[23.7rem] lg:-ml-12 xl:w-[calc(100%-28rem)]">

<div id="header" class="relative leading-none">

<div class="mt-0.5 space-y-2.5">

<div class="eyebrow h-5 text-primary dark:text-primary-light text-sm font-semibold">

Develop with MCP

</div>

<div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-start sm:items-center relative gap-2 min-w-0">

# Build an MCP client

<div id="page-context-menu"
class="items-center shrink-0 min-w-[156px] justify-end ml-auto sm:flex hidden">

<div class="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-center font-medium">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-4" />Copy page

</div>

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="transition-transform text-gray-400 overflow-visible group-hover:text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-600 dark:group-hover:text-gray-400 rotate-90" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="mt-2 text-lg prose prose-gray dark:prose-invert [&>*]:[overflow-wrap:anywhere]">

Get started building your own client that can integrate with all MCP
servers.

</div>

<div id="page-context-menu"
class="flex items-center shrink-0 min-w-[156px] mt-3 sm:hidden">

<div class="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-center font-medium">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-4" />Copy page

</div>

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="transition-transform text-gray-400 overflow-visible group-hover:text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-600 dark:group-hover:text-gray-400 rotate-90" />

</div>

</div>

<div id="content"
class="mdx-content @container/columns-container relative mt-8 prose prose-gray dark:prose-invert [contain:inline-size] isolate empty:hidden mb-14"
page-title="Build an MCP client" page-href="/docs/develop/build-client">

<span data-as="p">In this tutorial, you’ll learn how to build an
LLM-powered chatbot client that connects to MCP servers.</span>
<span data-as="p">Before you begin, it helps to have gone through our
<a href="build-server.html" class="link">Build an MCP Server</a>
tutorial so you can understand how clients and servers
communicate.</span>

<div id="python" class="tabs tabs tab-container">

- <div id="python">

  <div class="flex text-sm items-center gap-1.5 leading-6 font-semibold whitespace-nowrap pt-3 pb-2.5 -mb-px max-w-max border-b text-primary dark:text-primary-light border-current"
  component-part="tab-button" active="true" testid="tab-Python">

  Python

  </div>

  </div>

- <div id="typescript">

  <div class="flex text-sm items-center gap-1.5 leading-6 font-semibold whitespace-nowrap pt-3 pb-2.5 -mb-px max-w-max border-b text-gray-900 border-transparent hover:border-gray-300 dark:text-gray-200 dark:hover:border-gray-700"
  component-part="tab-button" active="false" testid="tab-TypeScript">

  TypeScript

  </div>

  </div>

- <div id="java">

  <div class="flex text-sm items-center gap-1.5 leading-6 font-semibold whitespace-nowrap pt-3 pb-2.5 -mb-px max-w-max border-b text-gray-900 border-transparent hover:border-gray-300 dark:text-gray-200 dark:hover:border-gray-700"
  component-part="tab-button" active="false" testid="tab-Java">

  Java

  </div>

  </div>

- <div id="kotlin">

  <div class="flex text-sm items-center gap-1.5 leading-6 font-semibold whitespace-nowrap pt-3 pb-2.5 -mb-px max-w-max border-b text-gray-900 border-transparent hover:border-gray-300 dark:text-gray-200 dark:hover:border-gray-700"
  component-part="tab-button" active="false" testid="tab-Kotlin">

  Kotlin

  </div>

  </div>

- <div id="c%23">

  <div class="flex text-sm items-center gap-1.5 leading-6 font-semibold whitespace-nowrap pt-3 pb-2.5 -mb-px max-w-max border-b text-gray-900 border-transparent hover:border-gray-300 dark:text-gray-200 dark:hover:border-gray-700"
  component-part="tab-button" active="false" testid="tab-C#">

  C#

  </div>

  </div>

- <div id="ruby">

  <div class="flex text-sm items-center gap-1.5 leading-6 font-semibold whitespace-nowrap pt-3 pb-2.5 -mb-px max-w-max border-b text-gray-900 border-transparent hover:border-gray-300 dark:text-gray-200 dark:hover:border-gray-700"
  component-part="tab-button" active="false" testid="tab-Ruby">

  Ruby

  </div>

  </div>

<div>

<div id="panel-python-0"
class="prose dark:prose-dark overflow-x-auto [&_[data-table-wrapper]]:![--page-padding:0px] [&_[role="listitem"]]:pl-4 [&>:first-child:not(p)]:mt-0 [&>:first-child:not(p)_img]:mt-0 [&>:first-child[data-table-wrapper]]:!pt-0"
role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="python" component-part="tab-content">

<span data-as="p"><a
href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/quickstart-resources/tree/main/mcp-client-python"
class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">You can find the complete
code for this tutorial here.</a></span>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#system-requirements"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">System Requirements</span>

<span data-as="p">Before starting, ensure your system meets these
requirements:</span>

- Mac or Windows computer
- Latest Python version installed
- Latest version of `uv` installed

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#setting-up-your-environment"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Setting Up Your Environment</span>

<span data-as="p">First, create a new Python project with `uv`:</span>

<div class="code-group p-0.5 mt-5 mb-8 flex flex-col not-prose relative rounded-2xl border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 min-w-0 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:codeblock-dark text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light"
dir="ltr" orientation="horizontal">

<div class="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 relative pr-2.5 *:first:*:ml-2.5"
component-part="code-group-tab-bar">

<div class="flex-1 w-0 text-xs leading-6 rounded-tl-xl gap-1 flex overflow-x-auto overflow-y-hidden scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
role="tablist" aria-orientation="horizontal" tabindex="-1"
orientation="horizontal" style="outline:none">

<div class="peer/title flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1.5 rounded-lg z-10 group-hover:bg-gray-200/50 dark:group-hover:bg-gray-700/70 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light">

macOS/Linux

</div>

<div class="absolute -bottom-1.5 left-0 right-0 h-0.5 rounded-full bg-primary dark:bg-primary-light peer-empty/title:hidden">

</div>

<div class="peer/title flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1.5 rounded-lg z-10 group-hover:bg-gray-200/50 dark:group-hover:bg-gray-700/70 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light">

Windows

</div>

</div>

<div class="flex items-center justify-end shrink-0 gap-1.5">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="flex flex-1 overflow-hidden">

<div id="radix-_R_1pildinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-content-0"
class="w-full min-w-full max-w-full h-full max-h-full relative [&_[data-component-part=code-block-root]]:!rounded-xt"
state="active" orientation="horizontal" role="tabpanel"
aria-labelledby="radix-_R_1pildinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-trigger-0"
tabindex="-1" style="animation-duration:0s">

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-xt bg-white overflow-auto overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:100%;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre flex-none text-sm h-full leading-6"
component-part="code-group-tab-content">

``` shiki
# Create project directory
uv init mcp-client
cd mcp-client

# Create virtual environment
uv venv

# Activate virtual environment
source .venv/bin/activate

# Install required packages
uv add mcp anthropic python-dotenv

# Remove boilerplate files
rm main.py

# Create our main file
touch client.py
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<div id="radix-_R_1pildinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-content-1"
class="w-full min-w-full max-w-full h-full max-h-full relative [&_[data-component-part=code-block-root]]:!rounded-xt"
state="inactive" orientation="horizontal" role="tabpanel"
aria-labelledby="radix-_R_1pildinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-trigger-1" hidden=""
tabindex="-1">

</div>

</div>

</div>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#setting-up-your-api-key"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Setting Up Your API Key</span>

<span data-as="p">You’ll need an Anthropic API key from the
<a href="https://console.anthropic.com/settings/keys" class="link"
target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">Anthropic Console</a>.</span><span data-as="p">Create
a `.env` file to store it:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="1" language="shellscript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
echo "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=your-api-key-goes-here" > .env
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">Add `.env` to your `.gitignore`:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="1" language="shellscript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
echo ".env" >> .gitignore
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-yellow-200 bg-yellow-50 dark:border-yellow-900 dark:bg-yellow-600/20 [&_[data-component-part='callout-icon']]:mt-px"
callout-type="warning">

<div class="mt-0.5 w-4" component-part="callout-icon">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="flex-none size-5 text-yellow-800 dark:text-yellow-300" />

</div>

<div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&_code]:!text-current [&_kbd]:!text-current [&_a]:!text-current [&_a]:border-current [&_strong]:!text-current text-yellow-800 dark:text-yellow-300"
component-part="callout-content">

<span data-as="p">Make sure you keep your `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`
secure!</span>

</div>

</div>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#creating-the-client"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Creating the Client</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#basic-client-structure"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Basic Client Structure</span>

<span data-as="p">First, let’s set up our imports and create the basic
client class:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="19" language="python">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
import asyncio
from typing import Optional
from contextlib import AsyncExitStack

from mcp import ClientSession, StdioServerParameters
from mcp.client.stdio import stdio_client

from anthropic import Anthropic
from dotenv import load_dotenv

load_dotenv()  # load environment variables from .env

class MCPClient:
    def __init__(self):
        # Initialize session and client objects
        self.session: Optional[ClientSession] = None
        self.exit_stack = AsyncExitStack()
        self.anthropic = Anthropic()
    # methods will go here
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#server-connection-management"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Server Connection Management</span>

<span data-as="p">Next, we’ll implement the method to connect to an MCP
server:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="28" language="python">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
async def connect_to_server(self, server_script_path: str):
    """Connect to an MCP server

    Args:
        server_script_path: Path to the server script (.py or .js)
    """
    is_python = server_script_path.endswith('.py')
    is_js = server_script_path.endswith('.js')
    if not (is_python or is_js):
        raise ValueError("Server script must be a .py or .js file")

    command = "python" if is_python else "node"
    server_params = StdioServerParameters(
        command=command,
        args=[server_script_path],
        env=None
    )

    stdio_transport = await self.exit_stack.enter_async_context(stdio_client(server_params))
    self.stdio, self.write = stdio_transport
    self.session = await self.exit_stack.enter_async_context(ClientSession(self.stdio, self.write))

    await self.session.initialize()

    # List available tools
    response = await self.session.list_tools()
    tools = response.tools
    print("\nConnected to server with tools:", [tool.name for tool in tools])
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#query-processing-logic"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Query Processing Logic</span>

<span data-as="p">Now let’s add the core functionality for processing
queries and handling tool calls:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="67" language="python">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
async def process_query(self, query: str) -> str:
    """Process a query using Claude and available tools"""
    messages = [
        {
            "role": "user",
            "content": query
        }
    ]

    response = await self.session.list_tools()
    available_tools = [{
        "name": tool.name,
        "description": tool.description,
        "input_schema": tool.inputSchema
    } for tool in response.tools]

    # Initial Claude API call
    response = self.anthropic.messages.create(
        model="claude-sonnet-4-20250514",
        max_tokens=1000,
        messages=messages,
        tools=available_tools
    )

    # Process response and handle tool calls
    final_text = []

    assistant_message_content = []
    for content in response.content:
        if content.type == 'text':
            final_text.append(content.text)
            assistant_message_content.append(content)
        elif content.type == 'tool_use':
            tool_name = content.name
            tool_args = content.input

            # Execute tool call
            result = await self.session.call_tool(tool_name, tool_args)
            final_text.append(f"[Calling tool {tool_name} with args {tool_args}]")

            assistant_message_content.append(content)
            messages.append({
                "role": "assistant",
                "content": assistant_message_content
            })
            messages.append({
                "role": "user",
                "content": [
                    {
                        "type": "tool_result",
                        "tool_use_id": content.id,
                        "content": result.content
                    }
                ]
            })

            # Get next response from Claude
            response = self.anthropic.messages.create(
                model="claude-sonnet-4-20250514",
                max_tokens=1000,
                messages=messages,
                tools=available_tools
            )

            final_text.append(response.content[0].text)

    return "\n".join(final_text)
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#interactive-chat-interface"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Interactive Chat Interface</span>

<span data-as="p">Now we’ll add the chat loop and cleanup
functionality:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="21" language="python">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
async def chat_loop(self):
    """Run an interactive chat loop"""
    print("\nMCP Client Started!")
    print("Type your queries or 'quit' to exit.")

    while True:
        try:
            query = input("\nQuery: ").strip()

            if query.lower() == 'quit':
                break

            response = await self.process_query(query)
            print("\n" + response)

        except Exception as e:
            print(f"\nError: {str(e)}")

async def cleanup(self):
    """Clean up resources"""
    await self.exit_stack.aclose()
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#main-entry-point"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Main Entry Point</span>

<span data-as="p">Finally, we’ll add the main execution logic:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="15" language="python">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
async def main():
    if len(sys.argv) < 2:
        print("Usage: python client.py <path_to_server_script>")
        sys.exit(1)

    client = MCPClient()
    try:
        await client.connect_to_server(sys.argv[1])
        await client.chat_loop()
    finally:
        await client.cleanup()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    import sys
    asyncio.run(main())
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">You can find the complete `client.py` file <a
href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/quickstart-resources/blob/main/mcp-client-python/client.py"
class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">here</a>.</span>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#key-components-explained"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Key Components Explained</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#1-client-initialization"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">1. Client Initialization</span>

- The `MCPClient` class initializes with session management and API
  clients
- Uses `AsyncExitStack` for proper resource management
- Configures the Anthropic client for Claude interactions

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#2-server-connection"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">2. Server Connection</span>

- Supports both Python and Node.js servers
- Validates server script type
- Sets up proper communication channels
- Initializes the session and lists available tools

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#3-query-processing"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">3. Query Processing</span>

- Maintains conversation context
- Handles Claude’s responses and tool calls
- Manages the message flow between Claude and tools
- Combines results into a coherent response

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#4-interactive-interface"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">4. Interactive Interface</span>

- Provides a simple command-line interface
- Handles user input and displays responses
- Includes basic error handling
- Allows graceful exit

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#5-resource-management"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">5. Resource Management</span>

- Proper cleanup of resources
- Error handling for connection issues
- Graceful shutdown procedures

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#common-customization-points"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Common Customization Points</span>

1.  <span data-as="p">**Tool Handling**</span>
    - Modify `process_query()` to handle specific tool types
    - Add custom error handling for tool calls
    - Implement tool-specific response formatting
2.  <span data-as="p">**Response Processing**</span>
    - Customize how tool results are formatted
    - Add response filtering or transformation
    - Implement custom logging
3.  <span data-as="p">**User Interface**</span>
    - Add a GUI or web interface
    - Implement rich console output
    - Add command history or auto-completion

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#running-the-client"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Running the Client</span>

<span data-as="p">To run your client with any MCP server:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="2" language="shellscript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
uv run client.py path/to/server.py # python server
uv run client.py path/to/build/index.js # node server
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 dark:border-blue-900 dark:bg-blue-600/20"
callout-type="note">

<div class="mt-0.5 w-4" component-part="callout-icon">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-4 text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300" />

</div>

<div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&_code]:!text-current [&_kbd]:!text-current [&_a]:!text-current [&_a]:border-current [&_strong]:!text-current text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300"
component-part="callout-content">

<span data-as="p">If you’re continuing <a
href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/quickstart-resources/tree/main/weather-server-python"
class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">the weather tutorial from
the server quickstart</a>, your command might look something like this:
`python client.py .../quickstart-resources/weather-server-python/weather.py`</span>

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">The client will:</span>

1.  Connect to the specified server
2.  List available tools
3.  Start an interactive chat session where you can:
    - Enter queries
    - See tool executions
    - Get responses from Claude

<span data-as="p">Here’s an example of what it should look like if
connected to the weather server from the server quickstart:</span>

<div>

<div class="frame p-2 not-prose relative bg-gray-50/50 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden dark:bg-gray-800/25 print:print-color-exact"
data-name="frame">

<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-grid-neutral-200/20 [mask-image:linear-gradient(0deg,#fff,rgba(255,255,255,0.6))] dark:bg-grid-white/5 dark:[mask-image:linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.1),rgba(255,255,255,0.5))] print:print-color-exact"
style="background-position:10px 10px">

</div>

<div class="relative rounded-xl overflow-hidden flex justify-center">

<span aria-owns="rmiz-modal-" rmiz=""><span rmiz-content="not-found"
style="visibility:visible"><img
src="https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/client-claude-cli-python.png?fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=686d6e0ae7c54f807827db111eaed7d4"
class="object-contain" style="aspect-ratio:1932 / 1739"
data-path="images/client-claude-cli-python.png" decoding="async"
sizes="(max-width: 1024px) 100vw, 1024px"
srcset="https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/client-claude-cli-python.png?w=280&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=48ff45c4ca51501589d9f20f060daa56 280w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/client-claude-cli-python.png?w=560&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=b35ca5d8a67c2f08efec9c6519efcfe2 560w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/client-claude-cli-python.png?w=840&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=51b8f5c7fa48db6ccd30aa9988a8c917 840w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/client-claude-cli-python.png?w=1100&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=9e1b01bc4c324a7e5100674f63f36b13 1100w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/client-claude-cli-python.png?w=1650&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=e3e961bd5b5506fed6c860f70df9bf9d 1650w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/client-claude-cli-python.png?w=2500&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=da01c2527db68cb0c99d29d20751a868 2500w"
data-optimize="true" width="1932" height="1739" /></span></span>

</div>

<div class="absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none border border-black/5 rounded-2xl dark:border-white/5">

</div>

</div>

</div>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#how-it-works"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">How It Works</span>

<span data-as="p">When you submit a query:</span>

1.  The client gets the list of available tools from the server
2.  Your query is sent to Claude along with tool descriptions
3.  Claude decides which tools (if any) to use
4.  The client executes any requested tool calls through the server
5.  Results are sent back to Claude
6.  Claude provides a natural language response
7.  The response is displayed to you

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#best-practices"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Best practices</span>

1.  <span data-as="p">**Error Handling**</span>
    - Always wrap tool calls in try-catch blocks
    - Provide meaningful error messages
    - Gracefully handle connection issues
2.  <span data-as="p">**Resource Management**</span>
    - Use `AsyncExitStack` for proper cleanup
    - Close connections when done
    - Handle server disconnections
3.  <span data-as="p">**Security**</span>
    - Store API keys securely in `.env`
    - Validate server responses
    - Be cautious with tool permissions
4.  <span data-as="p">**Tool Names**</span>
    - Tool names can be validated according to the format specified
      <a href="../../specification/draft/server/tools.html#tool-names"
      class="link">here</a>
    - If a tool name conforms to the specified format, it should not
      fail validation by an MCP client

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#troubleshooting"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Troubleshooting</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#server-path-issues"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Server Path Issues</span>

- Double-check the path to your server script is correct
- Use the absolute path if the relative path isn’t working
- For Windows users, make sure to use forward slashes (/) or escaped
  backslashes (\\ in the path
- Verify the server file has the correct extension (.py for Python or
  .js for Node.js)

<span data-as="p">Example of correct path usage:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="9" language="shellscript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
# Relative path
uv run client.py ./server/weather.py

# Absolute path
uv run client.py /Users/username/projects/mcp-server/weather.py

# Windows path (either format works)
uv run client.py C:/projects/mcp-server/weather.py
uv run client.py C:\\projects\\mcp-server\\weather.py
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#response-timing"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Response Timing</span>

- The first response might take up to 30 seconds to return
- This is normal and happens while:
  - The server initializes
  - Claude processes the query
  - Tools are being executed
- Subsequent responses are typically faster
- Don’t interrupt the process during this initial waiting period

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#common-error-messages"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Common Error Messages</span>

<span data-as="p">If you see:</span>

- `FileNotFoundError`: Check your server path
- `Connection refused`: Ensure the server is running and the path is
  correct
- `Tool execution failed`: Verify the tool’s required environment
  variables are set
- `Timeout error`: Consider increasing the timeout in your client
  configuration

</div>

<div id="panel-typescript-1"
class="prose dark:prose-dark overflow-x-auto [&_[data-table-wrapper]]:![--page-padding:0px] [&_[role="listitem"]]:pl-4 [&>:first-child:not(p)]:mt-0 [&>:first-child:not(p)_img]:mt-0 [&>:first-child[data-table-wrapper]]:!pt-0 hidden"
role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="typescript"
component-part="tab-content">

<span data-as="p"><a
href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/quickstart-resources/tree/main/mcp-client-typescript"
class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">You can find the complete
code for this tutorial here.</a></span>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#system-requirements-2"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">System Requirements</span>

<span data-as="p">Before starting, ensure your system meets these
requirements:</span>

- Mac or Windows computer
- Node.js 17 or higher installed
- Latest version of `npm` installed
- Anthropic API key (Claude)

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#setting-up-your-environment-2"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Setting Up Your Environment</span>

<span data-as="p">First, let’s create and set up our project:</span>

<div class="code-group p-0.5 mt-5 mb-8 flex flex-col not-prose relative rounded-2xl border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 min-w-0 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:codeblock-dark text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light"
dir="ltr" orientation="horizontal">

<div class="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 relative pr-2.5 *:first:*:ml-2.5"
component-part="code-group-tab-bar">

<div class="flex-1 w-0 text-xs leading-6 rounded-tl-xl gap-1 flex overflow-x-auto overflow-y-hidden scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
role="tablist" aria-orientation="horizontal" tabindex="-1"
orientation="horizontal" style="outline:none">

<div class="peer/title flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1.5 rounded-lg z-10 group-hover:bg-gray-200/50 dark:group-hover:bg-gray-700/70 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light">

macOS/Linux

</div>

<div class="absolute -bottom-1.5 left-0 right-0 h-0.5 rounded-full bg-primary dark:bg-primary-light peer-empty/title:hidden">

</div>

<div class="peer/title flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1.5 rounded-lg z-10 group-hover:bg-gray-200/50 dark:group-hover:bg-gray-700/70 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light">

Windows

</div>

</div>

<div class="flex items-center justify-end shrink-0 gap-1.5">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="flex flex-1 overflow-hidden">

<div id="radix-_R_1qildinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-content-0"
class="w-full min-w-full max-w-full h-full max-h-full relative [&_[data-component-part=code-block-root]]:!rounded-xt"
state="active" orientation="horizontal" role="tabpanel"
aria-labelledby="radix-_R_1qildinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-trigger-0"
tabindex="-1" style="animation-duration:0s">

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-xt bg-white overflow-auto overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:100%;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre flex-none text-sm h-full leading-6"
component-part="code-group-tab-content">

``` shiki
# Create project directory
mkdir mcp-client-typescript
cd mcp-client-typescript

# Initialize npm project
npm init -y

# Install dependencies
npm install @anthropic-ai/sdk @modelcontextprotocol/sdk dotenv

# Install dev dependencies
npm install -D @types/node typescript

# Create source file
touch index.ts
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<div id="radix-_R_1qildinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-content-1"
class="w-full min-w-full max-w-full h-full max-h-full relative [&_[data-component-part=code-block-root]]:!rounded-xt"
state="inactive" orientation="horizontal" role="tabpanel"
aria-labelledby="radix-_R_1qildinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-trigger-1" hidden=""
tabindex="-1">

</div>

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">Update your `package.json` to set `type: "module"` and
a build script:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark p-0.5"
numberoflines="6" language="json">

<div class="flex text-gray-400 text-xs rounded-t-[14px] leading-6 font-medium pl-4 pr-2.5 py-1"
component-part="code-block-header">

<div class="flex-grow-0 flex items-center gap-1.5 text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 min-w-0"
component-part="code-block-header-filename">

<span class="truncate min-w-0" title="package.json">package.json</span>

</div>

<div class="flex-1 flex items-center justify-end gap-1.5 print:hidden">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-xt bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
{
  "type": "module",
  "scripts": {
    "build": "tsc && chmod 755 build/index.js"
  }
}
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">Create a `tsconfig.json` in the root of your
project:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark p-0.5"
numberoflines="15" language="json">

<div class="flex text-gray-400 text-xs rounded-t-[14px] leading-6 font-medium pl-4 pr-2.5 py-1"
component-part="code-block-header">

<div class="flex-grow-0 flex items-center gap-1.5 text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 min-w-0"
component-part="code-block-header-filename">

<span class="truncate min-w-0"
title="tsconfig.json">tsconfig.json</span>

</div>

<div class="flex-1 flex items-center justify-end gap-1.5 print:hidden">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-xt bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2022",
    "module": "Node16",
    "moduleResolution": "Node16",
    "outDir": "./build",
    "rootDir": "./",
    "strict": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true
  },
  "include": ["index.ts"],
  "exclude": ["node_modules"]
}
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#setting-up-your-api-key-2"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Setting Up Your API Key</span>

<span data-as="p">You’ll need an Anthropic API key from the
<a href="https://console.anthropic.com/settings/keys" class="link"
target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">Anthropic Console</a>.</span><span data-as="p">Create
a `.env` file to store it:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="1" language="shellscript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
echo "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=<your key here>" > .env
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">Add `.env` to your `.gitignore`:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="1" language="shellscript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
echo ".env" >> .gitignore
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-yellow-200 bg-yellow-50 dark:border-yellow-900 dark:bg-yellow-600/20 [&_[data-component-part='callout-icon']]:mt-px"
callout-type="warning">

<div class="mt-0.5 w-4" component-part="callout-icon">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="flex-none size-5 text-yellow-800 dark:text-yellow-300" />

</div>

<div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&_code]:!text-current [&_kbd]:!text-current [&_a]:!text-current [&_a]:border-current [&_strong]:!text-current text-yellow-800 dark:text-yellow-300"
component-part="callout-content">

<span data-as="p">Make sure you keep your `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`
secure!</span>

</div>

</div>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#creating-the-client-2"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Creating the Client</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#basic-client-structure-2"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Basic Client Structure</span>

<span data-as="p">First, let’s set up our imports and create the basic
client class in `index.ts`:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="31" language="typescript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
import { Anthropic } from "@anthropic-ai/sdk";
import {
  MessageParam,
  Tool,
} from "@anthropic-ai/sdk/resources/messages/messages.mjs";
import { Client } from "@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/client/index.js";
import { StdioClientTransport } from "@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/client/stdio.js";
import readline from "readline/promises";
import dotenv from "dotenv";

dotenv.config();

const ANTHROPIC_API_KEY = process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY;
if (!ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) {
  throw new Error("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is not set");
}

class MCPClient {
  private mcp: Client;
  private anthropic: Anthropic;
  private transport: StdioClientTransport | null = null;
  private tools: Tool[] = [];

  constructor() {
    this.anthropic = new Anthropic({
      apiKey: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY,
    });
    this.mcp = new Client({ name: "mcp-client-cli", version: "1.0.0" });
  }
  // methods will go here
}
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#server-connection-management-2"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Server Connection Management</span>

<span data-as="p">Next, we’ll implement the method to connect to an MCP
server:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="36" language="typescript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
async connectToServer(serverScriptPath: string) {
  try {
    const isJs = serverScriptPath.endsWith(".js");
    const isPy = serverScriptPath.endsWith(".py");
    if (!isJs && !isPy) {
      throw new Error("Server script must be a .js or .py file");
    }
    const command = isPy
      ? process.platform === "win32"
        ? "python"
        : "python3"
      : process.execPath;

    this.transport = new StdioClientTransport({
      command,
      args: [serverScriptPath],
    });
    await this.mcp.connect(this.transport);

    const toolsResult = await this.mcp.listTools();
    this.tools = toolsResult.tools.map((tool) => {
      return {
        name: tool.name,
        description: tool.description,
        input_schema: tool.inputSchema,
      };
    });
    console.log(
      "Connected to server with tools:",
      this.tools.map(({ name }) => name)
    );
  } catch (e) {
    console.log("Failed to connect to MCP server: ", e);
    throw e;
  }
}
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#query-processing-logic-2"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Query Processing Logic</span>

<span data-as="p">Now let’s add the core functionality for processing
queries and handling tool calls:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="51" language="typescript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>
