<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="26" language="ruby">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
if ARGV.empty?
  puts "Usage: ruby client.rb <path_to_server_script>"
  exit 1
end

client = MCPClient.new

begin
  client.connect_to_server(ARGV[0])

  api_key = ENV["ANTHROPIC_API_KEY"]
  if api_key.nil? || api_key.empty?
    puts <<~MESSAGE
      No ANTHROPIC_API_KEY found. To query these tools with Claude, set your API key:
        export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=your-api-key-here
    MESSAGE
    exit
  end

  client.chat_loop
rescue => e
  puts "Error: #{e.message}"
  exit 1
ensure
  client.cleanup
end
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">You can find the complete `client.rb` file <a
href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/quickstart-resources/blob/main/mcp-client-ruby/client.rb"
class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">here</a>.</span>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#key-components-explained-3"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Key Components Explained</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#1-client-initialization-3"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">1. Client Initialization</span>

- The `MCPClient` class initializes with nil references for lazy setup
- The Anthropic client is lazily initialized via the `anthropic_client`
  method
- Uses `dotenv` to load environment variables from `.env`

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#2-server-connection-3"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">2. Server Connection</span>

- Supports Ruby, Python, and Node.js servers
- Uses `File.extname` to determine the server script type
- Uses `MCP::Client::Stdio` for stdio transport
- Initializes the MCP client and lists available tools

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#3-query-processing-3"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">3. Query Processing</span>

- Maps MCP tools to Anthropic tool format (`name`, `description`,
  `input_schema`)
- Uses `Anthropic::Models::TextBlock` and
  `Anthropic::Models::ToolUseBlock` for pattern matching
- Builds assistant content once before iterating tool calls
- Executes tool calls via `@mcp_client.call_tool`
- Uses `chat` helper method to wrap Anthropic API calls
- Extracts tool result content with `result.dig("result", "content")`
- Passes tool results back to Claude for a final response

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#4-interactive-interface-2"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">4. Interactive Interface</span>

- Provides a simple command-line interface
- Handles user input and displays responses
- Skips empty queries
- Includes basic error handling

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#5-resource-management-2"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">5. Resource Management</span>

- Proper cleanup of the transport via `begin`…`ensure`
- Top-level `rescue` for error handling
- API key validation after server connection

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#running-the-client-5"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Running the Client</span>

<span data-as="p">To run your client with any MCP server:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="3" language="shellscript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
bundle exec ruby client.rb path/to/server.rb # ruby server
bundle exec ruby client.rb path/to/server.py # python server
bundle exec ruby client.rb path/to/build/index.js # node server
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 dark:border-blue-900 dark:bg-blue-600/20"
callout-type="note">

<div class="mt-0.5 w-4" component-part="callout-icon">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-4 text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300" />

</div>

<div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&_code]:!text-current [&_kbd]:!text-current [&_a]:!text-current [&_a]:border-current [&_strong]:!text-current text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300"
component-part="callout-content">

<span data-as="p">If you’re continuing <a
href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/quickstart-resources/tree/main/weather-server-ruby"
class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">the weather tutorial from
the server quickstart</a>, your command might look something like this:
`bundle exec ruby client.rb /path/to/weather-server-ruby/weather.rb`</span>

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">The client will:</span>

1.  Connect to the specified server
2.  List available tools
3.  Start an interactive chat session where you can:
    - Enter queries
    - See tool executions
    - Get responses from Claude

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#how-it-works-5"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">How It Works</span>

<span data-as="p">When you submit a query:</span>

1.  The client gets the list of available tools from the server
2.  Your query is sent to Claude along with tool descriptions
3.  Claude decides which tools (if any) to use
4.  The client executes any requested tool calls through the server
5.  Results are sent back to Claude
6.  Claude provides a natural language response
7.  The response is displayed to you

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#best-practices-4"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Best practices</span>

1.  <span data-as="p">**Error Handling**</span>
    - Wrap tool calls in `begin`…`rescue` blocks
    - Provide meaningful error messages
    - Gracefully handle connection issues
2.  <span data-as="p">**Resource Management**</span>
    - Always close the transport when done
    - Use `begin`…`ensure` for proper cleanup
    - Handle server disconnections
3.  <span data-as="p">**Security**</span>
    - Store API keys securely in `.env`
    - Validate server responses
    - Be cautious with tool permissions
4.  <span data-as="p">**Tool Names**</span>
    - Tool names can be validated according to the format specified
      <a href="../../specification/draft/server/tools.html#tool-names"
      class="link">here</a>
    - If a tool name conforms to the specified format, it should not
      fail validation by an MCP client

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#troubleshooting-4"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Troubleshooting</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#server-path-issues-4"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Server Path Issues</span>

- Double-check the path to your server script is correct
- Use the absolute path if the relative path isn’t working
- For Windows users, make sure to use forward slashes (/) or escaped
  backslashes (\\ in the path
- Verify the server file has the correct extension (.py for Python, .js
  for Node.js, or .rb for Ruby)

<span data-as="p">Example of correct path usage:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="9" language="shellscript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
# Relative path
bundle exec ruby client.rb ./server/weather.rb

# Absolute path
bundle exec ruby client.rb /Users/username/projects/mcp-server/weather.rb

# Windows path (either format works)
bundle exec ruby client.rb C:/projects/mcp-server/weather.rb
bundle exec ruby client.rb C:\\projects\\mcp-server\\weather.rb
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#response-timing-4"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Response Timing</span>

- The first response might take up to 30 seconds to return
- This is normal and happens while:
  - The server initializes
  - Claude processes the query
  - Tools are being executed
- Subsequent responses are typically faster
- Don’t interrupt the process during this initial waiting period

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#common-error-messages-4"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Common Error Messages</span>

<span data-as="p">If you see:</span>

- `Errno::ENOENT`: Check your server path and ensure the command
  (`ruby`, `python3`, `node`) is available
- `Connection refused`: Ensure the server is running and the path is
  correct
- `Tool execution failed`: Verify the tool’s required environment
  variables are set
- `Anthropic::Errors::AuthenticationError`: Check your `.env` file has a
  valid `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`

</div>

</div>

</div>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-client.html#next-steps"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Next steps</span>

<div class="columns prose dark:prose-invert grid max-w-none gap-4 sm:grid-cols-[repeat(var(--cols),minmax(0,1fr))] @2xl/columns-container:grid-cols-[repeat(var(--cols),minmax(0,1fr))] @[0px]/columns-container:grid-cols-1 columns card-group dark:prose-dark gap-y-0"
style="--cols:2">

<div class="card block font-normal group relative my-2 ring-2 ring-transparent rounded-2xl bg-white dark:bg-background-dark border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 overflow-hidden w-full cursor-pointer hover:!border-primary dark:hover:!border-primary-light"
tabindex="0" role="link">

<div class="px-6 py-5 relative" component-part="card-content-container">

<div id="card-link-arrow-icon"
class="absolute text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-500 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light top-5 right-5 hidden">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="lucide lucide-arrow-up-right size-4" />

</div>

<div class="size-6 fill-gray-800 dark:fill-gray-100 text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-100"
component-part="card-icon">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-6 bg-primary dark:bg-primary-light !m-0 shrink-0" />

</div>

<div class="w-full">

## Example servers

<div class="prose mt-1 font-normal text-base leading-6 text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400"
component-part="card-content">

<span data-as="p">Check out our gallery of official MCP servers and
implementations</span>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="card block font-normal group relative my-2 ring-2 ring-transparent rounded-2xl bg-white dark:bg-background-dark border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 overflow-hidden w-full cursor-pointer hover:!border-primary dark:hover:!border-primary-light"
tabindex="0" role="link">

<div class="px-6 py-5 relative" component-part="card-content-container">

<div id="card-link-arrow-icon"
class="absolute text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-500 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light top-5 right-5 hidden">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="lucide lucide-arrow-up-right size-4" />

</div>

<div class="size-6 fill-gray-800 dark:fill-gray-100 text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-100"
component-part="card-icon">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-6 bg-primary dark:bg-primary-light !m-0 shrink-0" />

</div>

<div class="w-full">

## Example clients

<div class="prose mt-1 font-normal text-base leading-6 text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400"
component-part="card-content">

<span data-as="p">View the list of clients that support MCP
integrations</span>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="feedback-toolbar pb-16 w-full flex flex-col gap-y-8">

<div class="flex flex-row flex-wrap gap-4 items-center justify-between">

Was this page helpful?

<div class="flex flex-wrap flex-grow gap-3 items-center justify-end">

<div class="flex gap-3 items-center">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="fill-current" /><span class="small">Yes</span>

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="fill-current" /><span class="small">No</span>

</div>

<div class="flex gap-3">

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

class="px-0.5 flex items-center text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-200">

class="flex items-center space-x-3 group"><img

class="h-1.5 stroke-gray-400 overflow-visible group-hover:stroke-gray-600 dark:group-hover:stroke-gray-300" /><span
class="group-hover:text-gray-900 dark:group-hover:text-white">Build an
MCP server</span></a><a href="../sdk.html"
class="flex items-center ml-auto space-x-3 group"><span

src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="rotate-180 h-1.5 stroke-gray-400 overflow-visible group-hover:stroke-gray-600 dark:group-hover:stroke-gray-300" /></a>

</div>

<div class="left-0 right-0 sticky bottom-0 w-full overflow-hidden z-20 pointer-events-none print:hidden invisible"
aria-hidden="true">

<div class="chat-assistant-floating-input w-full group/assistant-bar relative before:content-[""] before:absolute before:left-0 before:right-0 before:top-1/2 before:h-[200px] before:bg-background-light before:dark:bg-background-dark translate-y-[100px] opacity-0">

<div class="relative pb-4 sm:pb-6">

<div class="flex flex-col w-full rounded-2xl pointer-events-auto bg-background-light/90 dark:bg-background-dark/90 backdrop-blur-xl border border-gray-200 dark:border-white/30 focus-within:border-primary dark:focus-within:border-primary-light transition-colors cursor-pointer">

<div class="relative flex items-end">

<span class="absolute right-11 bottom-3 text-xs font-medium text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-500 select-none pointer-events-none peer-focus/input:hidden hidden sm:inline">⌘I</span>

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="lucide lucide-arrow-up text-white dark:text-white size-3.5" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-5 h-5 bg-gray-400 dark:bg-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-500 dark:hover:bg-gray-400" /></a>
